description: Intrigue your sporty customers with this Black Friday email template. Showcase your product and personal brand flare with clear CTAs and bold logos. Don’t forget to include those discount codes to reel customers into your deals. Customize your design to make your most powerful ecommerce email template yet.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
